title: gc import status --json result
description: Machine-readable drift surface for pack imports: every declared import binding across scopes, the packs.lock pin closure, and the lockfile content hash.

schema_version.description: Schema version for this command output.

root.description: Absolute city or pack root the status was computed from.

packs_lock_path.description: Absolute path of the packs.lock file (which may not exist).

packs_lock_sha256.description: Hex-encoded SHA-256 digest of the raw packs.lock contents. Omitted when the file does not exist.

imports.description: Every declared import binding, sorted by name.

name.description: Scoped binding key: "pack:<name>" for root-pack imports, "default-rig:<name>" for default rig imports, and "rig:<rig>:<name>" for rig-scoped imports.

source.description: Declared source exactly as authored in TOML.

kind.description: "remote" for git-backed sources and "path" for local directory sources.

path.description: Resolved absolute path for kind "path" entries.

pin.description: packs.lock resolution for kind "remote" entries. Omitted when the source has no lock entry (unlocked).

fetched.description: RFC 3339 UTC fetch timestamp, when recorded.

locked_packs.description: Full packs.lock closure (direct and transitive pins), sorted by source.

fetched.description: RFC 3339 UTC fetch timestamp, when recorded.
